name: InlineHelpDirective
description:
The component that represents an inline-help.
Inline help is used to display help text in a popover, often inline with headers, body text and form labels.

inputs.name: additionalBodyClass
inputs.description: Additional CSS class(es) to apply to the popover body.

inputs.name: appendTo
inputs.description: The element to which the overlay is attached. By default it is body.

inputs.name: bodyId
inputs.description: ID for the Inline Help Popover body

inputs.name: bodyRole
inputs.description: aria-role for the Inline Help Popover body

inputs.name: closeOnEscapeKey
inputs.description: Whether the popover should close when the escape key is pressed.

inputs.name: closeOnNavigation
inputs.description: Whether to close the popover on router navigation start.

inputs.name: closeOnOutsideClick
inputs.description: Whether the popover should close when a click is made outside its boundaries.

inputs.name: disabled
inputs.description: Whether the inline help is disabled.

inputs.name: fixedPosition
inputs.description: Whether position should remain fixed when approaching page corners.

inputs.name: inlineHelpContent
inputs.description: Inline help text to display inside generated popover

inputs.name: maxWidth
inputs.description: Maximum width of popover body in px.

inputs.name: noArrow
inputs.description: Whether the popover should have an arrow.

inputs.name: restoreFocusOnClose
inputs.description: Whether to restore focus to the previously focused element when the popover closes.

inputs.name: triggers
inputs.description:
The trigger events that will open/close the inline help component.
Accepts any HTML DOM Events or TriggerConfig objects.
